short_title: Savings Through Health Protocols and Malpractice Reform Act of 1993
official_title: To provide for uniformity of quality and a substantial reduction in the overall costs of health care in the United States through the development of diagnostic and treatment protocols and the implementation of the protocols in the program under title XVIII of the Social Security Act, the imposition of limitations on the amount of damages that may be paid in a health care liability action, and the mandatory establishment by States of alternative dispute resolution systems to resolve health care liability claims, and for other purposes.
